microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across strategic enterprise accounts including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining program requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that **reduced operational toil by 30%** and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model aligned to customer mission outcomes.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new standard for continuous operational validation across enterprise deployments.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating stakeholders across engineering, ops, and senior leadership.

Scaled team leverage through AI-driven automation by building an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by **39%** and expanding drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Translated complex customer requirements and operational objectives into coordinated cross-functional action plans, partnering with engineering, operations, and support teams to ensure **on-time program delivery** and sustained account health across mission-critical deployments.
microsoft_2023: Championed **adoption of AI-driven workflows** across 14 key Azure service teams, conducting user demos and structured training sessions that drove measurable utilization and saved 37 engineering hours monthly across the program.

Shaped the product roadmap by facilitating **11+ stakeholder interviews** with Azure service teams to surface critical capability gaps, directly influencing prioritization of intent-based YAML generation as a high-value feature for operational users.

Optimized data integrity and retrieval by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** platform, reducing lookup time by 83% and improving cross-team operational efficiency.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched cloud regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ internal teams and multiple engineering orgs.

Mobilized a program strategy to mitigate operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual effort** per region and building a roadmap to automate the highest-impact execution paths.

Enabled leadership to target automation gaps and prioritize high-value investments by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** that tracked and visualized operational toil across 140+ teams, directly informing executive program decisions.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating execution across IT, operations, and engineering stakeholders.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **prioritizing 40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and maintain program velocity throughout a complex, multi-team technology transition.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated CI/CD pipelines, **accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25%** and reducing manual handoffs that created program execution risk.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end operations and managing the full scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a new CRM process that improved team accountability and customer responsiveness.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and Google Business profile to drive qualified inbound demand.

Improved leadership pricing models and **sealed margin leaks** by conducting financial profitability analysis across 1,000+ project records, identifying systemic cost drivers and delivering data-backed recommendations to executive stakeholders.
